title: Monorepo support review
goal: Review overall monorepo support after dogfooding showed the proof router did not detect Makefiles in subrepos.
Capture evidence-backed follow-up candidates without activating implementation work in this pass.
scope: Proof routing for changed paths under package or subrepo roots.
Target proof capability discovery across root and nested project manifests.
Command selection output shape for monorepo-local validation commands.
non_goals: Do not implement monorepo discovery or proof routing changes in this review pass.
Do not assume this source repo's root Makefile target names are a valid contract for all host monorepos.
Do not create or close GitHub issues from this artifact unless a later promotion pass chooses that route.

review_mode.review question: Does the current validation/proof lane support monorepos as first-class targets, especially when relevant proof commands live in subrepo Makefiles or package manifests?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: proof selection implementation, proof selection tests, proof-selection rules, root and package Makefiles, current proof output for package-local changes, and workspace configuration/schema surfaces

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace start --task "Produce a review on overall monorepo support, prompted by proof router not detecting Makefiles in subrepos" --format json; rg proof/Makefile/monorepo surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --verbose --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py --format json; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter Makefile
review_method.evidence sources: src/agentic_workspace/cli.py proof capability discovery and command selection, tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py proof router coverage, src/agentic_workspace/contracts/proof_selection_rules.json path lanes, root Makefile, packages/planning/Makefile, packages/memory/Makefile, pyproject.toml [tool.uv.workspace]

references.label: Proof capability discovery and proof command selection

findings.title: Proof capability discovery is root-scoped and misses subrepo Makefiles
findings.summary: The proof router discovers only `target_root/Makefile` and `target_root/package.json`, so a monorepo package with its own Makefile or package manifest is invisible unless the root Makefile happens to delegate to it.
findings.evidence: `_makefile_targets` reads only `target_root / "Makefile"`; `_package_json_scripts` reads only `target_root / "package.json"`; `_target_proof_capabilities` reports only root-level `make` and `package_json` fields. This repo has package-local Makefiles under `packages/planning/` and `packages/memory/`, and `pyproject.toml` declares uv workspace members.
findings.risk if unchanged: Host monorepos without root delegating targets will route package-local changes to manual verification or wrong root-level commands even when a good subrepo proof command exists.
findings.suggested action: Add first-class monorepo capability discovery that maps changed paths to nearest project roots and discovers Makefile/package/language capabilities at those roots before falling back to root-level proof.
findings.promotion target: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap or issue intake for proof-routing monorepo support
findings.promotion trigger: Promote when proof routing work resumes, or immediately if another host monorepo reports missed subrepo validation commands.
findings.post-remediation note shape: shrink to a pointer to the monorepo discovery contract/tests once implemented

findings.title: Selected proof commands cannot represent package-local cwd
findings.summary: Proof output currently hardcodes selected command `cwd` as `.` and validation-plan steps inherit that root cwd, so even if subrepo commands are discovered later, the current output shape is too weak to express `cwd=packages/planning` or equivalent command locality.
findings.evidence: `_proof_selection_for_changed_paths` builds every selected command with `cwd: "."`; current verbose proof for a `packages/planning/...` change reports `make test-planning` with `cwd: "."`; package-local Makefiles contain direct `test`, `lint`, and check targets that would need package-local execution context if root delegation is absent.
findings.risk if unchanged: A future subrepo discovery patch could still emit commands that run in the wrong directory, causing false failures or encouraging root-specific wrapper targets as a hidden requirement.
findings.suggested action: Extend proof command records and validation-plan steps to carry command root, source path, and locality reason; adapt command rendering to either `cwd=<subrepo>` plus local command or an explicit root-level delegating command.
findings.promotion trigger: Promote with subrepo Makefile discovery, because discovery and cwd locality need to land together to avoid another partial monorepo fix.
findings.post-remediation note shape: shrink after selected proof command records include locality and regression coverage

findings.title: Monorepo membership is inferred ad hoc rather than represented as a contract
findings.summary: The workspace has path lanes for `packages/planning/` and `packages/memory/`, but there is no general monorepo-root contract that proof, ownership, setup/adopt route hints, and validation output can share.
findings.evidence: `proof_selection_rules.json` has hard-coded package path prefixes and lanes; `pyproject.toml` declares `[tool.uv.workspace].members`; proof route hints describe live target capabilities as current Makefile/package.json/language discovery, but the capability payload has no `project_roots` or `workspace_members` section.
findings.risk if unchanged: Each subsystem will rediscover monorepo structure differently, causing drift between proof routing, subsystem ownership, setup/adopt learning, generated package work, and future host-repo support.
findings.suggested action: Introduce a small implementation-independent monorepo/project-root discovery surface with roots, root type, manifest path, proof candidates, and owner path prefixes; have proof routing consume that surface rather than special-casing package prefixes.
findings.promotion target: contracts plus proof routing implementation, likely `src/agentic_workspace/contracts/` and `src/agentic_workspace/cli.py`
findings.promotion trigger: Promote before broadening generated CLI or workspace proof support to additional monorepo packages/languages.
findings.post-remediation note shape: stub after a canonical project-root contract and proof selectors replace this review as evidence

recommendation.promote: Promote a single bounded follow-up for monorepo proof routing if the next implementation slice touches proof selection. The first implementation should discover changed-path project roots, detect subrepo Makefiles/package manifests, and emit cwd-aware proof commands.
recommendation.defer: Do not widen immediately into full monorepo lifecycle/install semantics; the urgent proven gap is validation/proof routing.

retention.proof surface: future issue or planning item, proof-routing tests, and monorepo/project-root contract
retention.source retention rule: Keep this artifact as the dogfooding evidence record until the monorepo proof-routing follow-up lands; then shrink to findings, outcome, and proof links.
retention.distillation path: If promoted, move active implementation details into an issue or execplan and keep this review as evidence/history only.

review_finding.rule: Use only these headings when a prose finding is needed; keep the canonical fields structured.

field_map.Next owner: execution_summary/follow-on routed to or required_continuation/owner surface

handoff_or_closeout.rule: Prefer structured fields; use this shape only for short human-readable summaries.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-12: Review created after dogfooding report that proof routing did not detect Makefiles in subrepos.
